title: REAP’s Mid-Year Highlights
summary: REAP’s Mid-Year Highlights Reflecting on the first half of 2021, REAP has made progress on sharing our clean energy message, increasing energy literacy in K-12 students and furthering energy policies that facilitate clean energy development in Alaska. We spread our clean energy message to Alaskans Presented at 51 community events Presentations are a large part of how we educate and inform Alaskans about clean energy. title: October 2021 meeting – Anchorage/online
summary: Agenda , Schedule , Review Documents . The Council will meet September 30 – October 15, 2021, via webconference and tentatively in person at the Egan Center for the last week. Remote testimony will be an option if the Council meets in person.

title: June 2021 Meeting – Webconference
summary: Newsletter , Agenda . The Council met June 1-16, 2021, via web conference. Audio files have been uploaded.
